title: Inyigisho z'Ibyanditswe

title: Enseignements Bibliques
description: Categorie des enseignements bibliques approfondis pour fortifier la foi et la comprehension.

title: Ubuhamya bw'Ukuri
description: Ubuhamya bw'abizera bwerekana uburyo Imana ikora mu buzima bwa buri munsi.

title: Faith Testimonies
description: Believers' testimonies showing how God works in everyday life.

title: Temoignages de Foi
description: Temoignages des croyants montrant l'oeuvre de Dieu dans la vie quotidienne.

title: Amasengesho n'Ubwiyunge
description: Ubutumwa n'ibiganiro byubaka ubuzima bw'isengesho no kugendana n'Imana.

title: Prayer and Devotion
description: Messages and sessions that strengthen prayer life and daily devotion.

title: Priere et Devotion
description: Messages et enseignements pour affermir la vie de priere et de devotion.

title: Inyigisho z'Amajwi
description: Icyiciro cy'amajwi y'inyigisho z'ijambo ry'Imana ushobora kumva aho uri hose.

title: Audio Sermons
description: Audio teachings of God's word for listening anywhere, anytime.

title: Sermons Audio
description: Enseignements audio de la parole de Dieu a ecouter partout et a tout moment.

title: Indirimbo z'Ibisigo
description: Indirimbo zo kuramya no guhimbaza Imana zubaka umutima no kwizera.

title: Worship Songs
description: Songs of worship and praise that uplift hearts and strengthen faith.

title: Chants de Louange
description: Chants dadoration et de louange qui elevent les coeurs et fortifient la foi.

title: Amasengesho y'Amajwi
description: Amajwi y'amasengesho ayobora abizera mu gusenga no kwizera byimbitse.

title: Prayer Audio
description: Prayer audio sessions that guide believers into deeper prayer.

title: Audio de Priere
description: Sessions audio de priere pour accompagner les croyants dans une priere profonde.

title: Ibitabo by'Iyobokamana
description: Ibitabo n'inyandiko bigamije gufasha abakristo gukura mu byo kwizera.

title: Spiritual Books
description: Books and writings designed to help believers grow spiritually.

title: Livres Spirituels
description: Livres et ecrits pour aider les croyants a grandir spirituellement.

title: Inyigisho Zanditse
description: Inyandiko z'inyigisho zifasha gusobanukirwa ukuri kwa Bibiliya mu buryo bworoshye.

title: Written Teachings
description: Written teachings that explain biblical truth clearly and practically.

title: Enseignements Ecrits
description: Enseignements ecrits qui expliquent clairement et pratiquement la verite biblique.

title: Amasomo y'Abana
description: Ibitabo n'amasomo y'abana bibatoza gukunda Imana no kugendera mu kuri.

title: Children's Lessons
description: Books and lessons that teach children to love God and walk in truth.

title: Lecons pour Enfants
description: Livres et lecons pour apprendre aux enfants a aimer Dieu et marcher dans la verite.

title: Ivugabutumwa Rusange
description: Icyiciro rusange gihuza ubutumwa bw'ivugabutumwa muri video, amajwi n'inyandiko.

title: General Evangelism
description: General evangelism content across video, audio, and written resources.

title: Evangelisation Generale
description: Contenu general d'evangelisation en video, audio et documents.

title: Urubyiruko n'Imiryango
description: Ubutumwa bufasha urubyiruko n'imiryango kubaho mu ndangagaciro z'ijambo ry'Imana.

title: Youth and Families
description: Messages for youth and families to live by God's word and values.

title: Jeunesse et Familles
description: Messages pour la jeunesse et les familles afin de vivre selon la parole de Dieu.

title: Isengesho n'Ububyutse
description: Icyiciro cy'ubutumwa n'ibikoresho bishyigikira ububyutse n'ubuzima bw'isengesho.

title: Prayer and Revival
description: Messages and resources supporting spiritual revival and prayer life.

title: Priere et Reveil
description: Messages et ressources pour soutenir le reveil spirituel et la vie de priere.

title: Ubutumwa bw'Abamarayika Batatu
description: Urukurikirane rw'inyigisho ku butumwa bwo mu Ibyahishuwe 14 no guhamagarira abantu gusenga Imana by'ukuri.

title: Three Angels' Messages
description: A sermon series on Revelation 14 and the end-time call to true worship.

title: Messages des Trois Anges
description: Une serie de predications sur Apocalypse 14 et l'appel final a la vraie adoration.

title: Isabato n'Irema
description: Inyigisho zigaragaza Isabato nk'ikimenyetso cy'irema n'ubusabane n'Imana.

title: Sabbath and Creation
description: Teachings on the Sabbath as a sign of creation and covenant relationship with God.

title: Sabbat et Creation
description: Enseignements sur le Sabbat comme signe de la creation et de l'alliance avec Dieu.

title: Yesu Umutambyi Mukuru
description: Urukurikirane ku murimo wa Kristo mu buturo bwo mu ijuru no kwizera gukiza.

title: Jesus Our High Priest
description: A series on Christ's ministry in the heavenly sanctuary and saving faith.

title: Jesus Notre Souverain Sacrificateur
description: Une serie sur le ministere du Christ dans le sanctuaire celeste et la foi salvatrice.

title: Ubuzima buzira umuze bwa Gikristo
description: Inyigisho ku mibereho myiza, kwirinda no kubaha Imana mu mibiri yacu.

title: Christian Health Message
description: Sermons on healthful living, temperance, and honoring God with our bodies.

title: Message de Sante Chretienne
description: Predications sur la sante, la temperance et la gloire de Dieu dans notre corps.

title: Umuryango wubakiye kuri Kristo
description: Urukurikirane rwigisha kubaka urugo rw'amasengesho, urukundo n'ubudahemuka.

title: Christ-Centered Family
description: A practical series on prayerful homes, marriage fidelity, and biblical parenting.

title: Famille Centree sur le Christ
description: Une serie pratique sur la famille de priere, la fidelite et leducation biblique.

title: Ubutumwa bw'Ububyutse n'Ivugurura
description: Inyigisho zihamagarira kwihana, kuvugurura umutima no gukomera mu kwizera.

title: Revival and Reformation
description: Messages calling believers to repentance, spiritual renewal, and deeper faithfulness.

title: Reveil et Reforme
description: Messages appelant a la repentance, au renouveau spirituel et a la fidelite.

title: Daniyeli n'Ibyahishuwe
description: Urukurikirane rw'ubuhanuzi busobanura ibihe n'ibyiringiro byo kugaruka kwa Kristo.

title: Daniel and Revelation
description: A prophecy series explaining end-time events and the hope of Christ's return.

title: Daniel et Apocalypse
description: Une serie prophetique sur les temps de la fin et l'esperance du retour du Christ.

title: Kwitegura Kugaruka kwa Yesu
description: Inyigisho zo gufasha abizera kuba maso, gusenga no gukorera Imana mu gihe cya nyuma.

title: Preparing for Jesus' Return
description: Sermons to help believers watch, pray, and serve faithfully in the last days.

title: Preparation au Retour de Jesus
description: Predications pour aider les croyants a veiller, prier et servir fidelement.

title: UKOMERETSA NIWE UKIZA
description: Inyigisho ivuga ku Mana ikosora kandi ikagarura ubuzima ku bayizera. Umubabaro wo gukosorwa urangira mu gukira.

title: The One Who Wounds Is the One Who Heals
description: A message about God who corrects and restores. Discipline may hurt for a moment, but it brings healing.

title: Celui Qui Blesse Est Celui Qui Guerit
description: Un message sur Dieu qui corrige et restaure. La correction peut faire mal un moment, mais elle apporte la guerison.

title: Imbabazi n'Umurava Bye Kukuvaho
description: Ubutumwa buhamagarira kwizirika ku mbabazi z'Imana no kubaho ubuzima bw'umurava mu rugendo rwo kwizera.

title: May Mercy and Diligence Not Depart from You
description: An exhortation to hold fast to God's mercy and to live with diligence in the walk of faith.

title: Que la Misericorde et le Zele Ne Te Quittent Pas
description: Un appel a demeurer dans la misericorde de Dieu et a vivre avec zele dans la foi.

title: URUFATIRO NYAKURI
description: Inyigisho ishimangira ko urufatiro rw'ukuri rw'ubuzima bwa gikristo ari Kristo n'ijambo rye ridahinduka.

title: The True Foundation
description: A message emphasizing Christ and His unchanging word as the only sure foundation.

title: Le Vrai Fondement
description: Un message qui affirme que le Christ et sa parole immuable sont le seul fondement sur.

title: Ubuntu bw'Imana bwabonetse
description: Ubutumwa bwerekana ubuntu bw'Imana butwigisha kubaho twera no gutegereza ibyiringiro byiza.

title: The Grace of God Has Appeared
description: A sermon on God's grace that trains us to live holy lives while awaiting blessed hope.

title: La Grace de Dieu Est Apparue
description: Une predication sur la grace de Dieu qui nous enseigne a vivre saintement en attendant la bienheureuse esperance.

title: Nigute umuntu yakwandikwa mu gitabo cy'ubugingo?
description: Inyigisho isobanura inzira yo kwihana, kwizera no kuguma muri Kristo kugira ngo umuntu abe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo.

title: How Can a Person Be Written in the Book of Life?
description: A message on repentance, faith, and abiding in Christ to be found in the Book of Life.

title: Comment Etre Inscrit Dans le Livre de Vie ?
description: Un message sur la repentance, la foi et la communion avec le Christ pour etre trouve dans le Livre de Vie.

title: Umwuka ni we utanga ubugingo, umubiri nta cyo umaze
description: Ubutumwa bugaragaza ko ubuzima nyakuri buturuka ku Mwuka Wera, kandi ko umuntu adakwiriye kwiringira imbaraga ze bwite.

title: The Spirit Gives Life; The Flesh Profits Nothing
description: A teaching that true life comes through the Holy Spirit, not human strength.

title: L'Esprit Donne la Vie; la Chair Ne Sert de Rien
description: Un enseignement montrant que la vraie vie vient du Saint-Esprit et non de la force humaine.

title: AKAGA MU GIHE CY'UBUSAZA
description: Inyigisho ishingiye kuri Zaburi 71:9, ihamagarira kwizirika ku Mana no mu busaza igihe intege zigabanutse.

title: Danger in Old Age
description: A Psalm 71:9 based sermon calling believers to cling to God in old age when strength declines.

title: Le Danger au Temps de la Vieillesse
description: Une predication basee sur le Psaume 71:9, appelant a s'attacher a Dieu meme dans la vieillesse.

title: UBUBATA
description: Ubutumwa busobanura ububata bw'ibyaha n'uburyo Kristo atanga umudendezo nyakuri ku bamwizera.

title: Bondage
description: A message exposing bondage to sin and the true freedom found in Christ.

title: La Servitude
description: Un message sur la servitude du peche et la vraie liberte en Jesus-Christ.

title: The Great Controversy
description:
This is the second edition of “The Great Controversy Between Christ and Satan”, revised and corrected from the first edition. It faithfully follows the original English publication.

The book presents the great conflict between good and evil from the destruction of Jerusalem through the Reformation and into the final events of earth’s history. It strengthens faith and prepares believers for Christ’s return.

title: La Tragédie des Siècles
description:
Deuxième édition révisée et corrigée du livre « La Tragédie des Siècles », fidèle à l’original anglais.

Ce livre décrit le grand conflit entre le bien et le mal à travers l’histoire, depuis la destruction de Jérusalem jusqu’aux événements de la fin des temps, préparant les croyants au retour du Christ.

title: INTAMBARA IKOMEYE
description:
Iyi ni ngeri ya kabiri y’igitabo “Intambara Ikomeye Hagati ya Kristo na Satani”. Muri iyi ngeri, ibidatunganye byagaragaye mu ya mbere byarakosowe, kandi igitabo cyateguwe hakurikijwe umwimerere w’icyongereza “The Great Controversy Between Christ and Satan”.

Iki gitabo gisobanura intambara iri hagati y’icyiza n’ikibi kuva mu mateka ya kera, gusenyuka kwa Yerusalemu, kugeza ku bihe bya nyuma no kugaruka kwa Kristo. Gitera kwizera, kigakomeza umutima w’abizera kandi kikabategurira ibihe bya nyuma.

title: Prophets and Kings
description:
Prophets and Kings” is the second volume in the five-book series explaining sacred history. Though written later, it presents a powerful overview of the lives of Israel’s prophets and kings.

Through decades of ministry, Ellen G. White revealed that behind human history stand unseen forces — the hand of God working in righteousness and the opposing power of the enemy. This book connects biblical history with the ongoing spiritual conflict between good and evil.

title: Prophètes et Rois
description:
Prophètes et Rois » est le deuxième volume de la série expliquant l’histoire sacrée. Ce livre met en lumière la vie des prophètes et des rois d’Israël.

Ellen G. White montre que derrière les événements humains agissent des forces invisibles : la main de Dieu et l’œuvre de l’ennemi. L’ouvrage relie l’histoire biblique au conflit spirituel entre le bien et le mal.

title: ABAHANUZI N’ABAMI
description:
Abahanuzi n’Abami” ni igitabo cya kabiri mu bitabo bitanu by’ingenzi bisobanura amateka yera. Nubwo ari cyo cyanditswe bwa nyuma muri uru ruhererekane, gifite agaciro gakomeye mu gusobanura amateka y’abahanuzi n’abami ba Isirayeli.

Mu myaka irenga 70 Ellen G. White yamaze yigisha no kwandika, yagiye agaragaza ubusobanuro bwimbitse bw’ibyabaye mu mateka y’abantu, agaragaza ko inyuma y’ibibera mu bantu habamo imbaraga zitagaragara: ukuboko kw’Imana gukorera mu gukiranuka n’imbaraga z’umwanzi zishaka kurimbura.

Iki gitabo gifasha umusomyi gusobanukirwa isano iri hagati y’amateka y’abantu n’intambara y’umwuka ikomeje hagati y’icyiza n’ikibi.

title: IGICE CYA 2 ingoro no kwegurirwa imana kwayo
IGICE CYA 2 ingoro no kwegurirwa imana kwayo
IGICE CYA 2 ingoro no kwegurirwa imana kwayo
3. IGICE CYA 3 ubwibone buterwa no kugubwa neza kwirata ubukire
The Acts of the Apostles
description:
The Acts of the Apostles” is the fourth volume in the sacred history series. It tells the inspiring story of the early Christian believers after Christ’s victory over Satan and His ascension to heaven.

The book describes intense persecution, unwavering faith, and the missionary journeys of Peter, Paul, John, James, Luke, Barnabas, Stephen, Mark, and other early disciples who carried the gospel throughout the known world.

Though many sacrificed their lives for their faith, the story continues today as Christ’s church advances under the same divine promises and spiritual power.

title: Les Actes des Apôtres
description:
Les Actes des Apôtres » est le quatrième volume de la série d’histoire sacrée. Il raconte l’histoire inspirante de l’Église chrétienne primitive après l’ascension du Christ.

Le livre décrit les persécutions sévères, la fidélité des croyants et l’expansion de l’Évangile par Pierre, Paul, Jean, Jacques et les autres disciples.

Malgré les sacrifices, l’œuvre continue aujourd’hui, guidée par les mêmes promesses et la puissance de Dieu.

title: IBYAKOZWE N’INTUMWA
description:
Ibyakozwe n’Intumwa” ni igitabo cya kane mu ruhererekane rw’ibitabo bisobanura amateka yera. Gisobanura inkuru itangaje y’itorero rya mbere nyuma y’uko Yesu amaze gutsinda Satani agasubira mu ijuru.

Iki gitabo kigaragaza uburyo umwanzi yahanganye n’itorero rya Kristo ku isi, binyuze mu gutotezwa gukomeye no kugerageza kwizera kw’abakristo ba mbere. Petero, Pawulo, Yakobo, Yohana, Luka, Barinaba, Sitefano, Mariko n’izindi ntumwa zatwaye ubutumwa bwiza ku isi yose yari izwi icyo gihe.

Nubwo benshi batanze ubuzima bwabo kubera kwizera kwabo, ubutumwa bwiza bwakomeje gukwira hose. Inkuru iracyakomeza no muri iki gihe, kuko itorero rya Kristo rikomeje umurimo umwe kandi rifite amasezerano amwe yo kuyoborwa n’imbaraga z’Imana.

title: IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
IGICE CYA 1 UMUGAMBI IMANA IFITIYE ITORERO RYAYO
The One Desired in All Ages
description:
In every human heart, regardless of background or social status, there is a deep longing for something greater than what is currently possessed.

This desire was placed in humanity by a merciful God so that people would not be satisfied with temporary achievements. God invites every person to seek what is eternal — truth, salvation, and everlasting life.

title: Celui qui est Désiré en Tout Temps
description:
Dans le cœur de chaque être humain se trouve un profond désir de quelque chose de plus grand. Ce désir a été placé par un Dieu miséricordieux afin que l’homme ne se contente pas de ce qu’il possède temporairement.

Ce message invite chacun à rechercher ce qui est éternel et à recevoir la bénédiction de la vie éternelle.

title: UWIFUZWA IBIHE BYOSE
description:
Uwifuzwa Ibihe Byose” ni ubutumwa bushingiye ku kuri ko mu mitima y’abantu bose, hatitawe ku bwoko cyangwa urwego rw’imibereho, habamo icyifuzo gikomeye cyo kubona icyo badafite.

Iki cyifuzo cyashyizwe mu muntu n’Imana y’inyambabazi, kugira ngo atanyurwa n’ubuzima bwe bwa none cyangwa ngo yishimire ibyo agezeho gusa. Imana yifuza ko umuntu ashakisha icy’ingenzi kirenze ibindi byose — ukuri, agakiza n’ubugingo buhoraho.

Ubu butumwa burahamagarira buri wese gushaka iby’iteka, no kwakira umugisha w’ubugingo bw’ibihe bidashira.

title: IGICE CYA 1 IMANA IRI KUMWE NATWE
IGICE CYA 1 IMANA IRI KUMWE NATWE
IGICE CYA 1 IMANA IRI KUMWE NATWE
